seoTitle: Bentleigh East vs Beremboke — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Bentleigh East and Beremboke. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Bentleigh East vs Beremboke: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bentleigh East and Beremboke.
heading: Bentleigh East vs Beremboke — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bentleigh East, Victoria and Beremboke, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Beremboke has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Bentleigh East (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bentleigh East or Beremboke safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bentleigh East has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Beremboke scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bentleigh East scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Beremboke scores 53/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bentleigh East or Beremboke?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Beremboke has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.68% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
